title: Harry Styles Takes Kiss All The Time To Manchester For First Concert In Three Years
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:
Yesterday Harry Styles unveiled his highly anticipated and severely underwhelming new album Kiss All The Time. Disco, Occasionally. Last night the pop star celebrated with a special one-off at Manchester's Co-op Live to perform the record in full for the first time.

The post Harry Styles Takes <em>Kiss All The Time</em> To Manchester For First Concert In Three Years appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Yesterday Harry Styles unveiled his highly anticipated and severely underwhelming new album Kiss All The Time. Disco, Occasionally. Last night the pop star celebrated with a special one-off at Manchester's Co-op Live to perform the record in full for the first time.

Styles gave the lead single "Aperture" its live debut at the BRIT Awards a week ago. After playing through Kiss All The Time last night, the encore consisted of his old hits "Watermelon Sugar," "As It Was," "Sign Of The Times," and "Golden," as well as "From The Dining Table" for the first time since 2018. He has a bunch of residencies all over the globe coming up, including 30 shows at New York's Madison Square Garden.

Harry Styles. One Night In Manchester will stream on Netflix on Sunday at 3 p.m. ET.
